examples: Oct. 24, 8:15 A.M. I'm sitting in homeroom and I'm the first person here.
Be on time – know what time your Homeroom is scheduled and know what room to go to.
"All of the teachers acknowledged that he was a sharp kid," his homeroom teacher said.
Early senior year, a girl in homeroom passed me a brochure that a college had sent her.
Today he had a feeling that the Nethers might kidnap Suzanne Bledsoe, the new girl in homeroom.
